{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260324004834C5E1A5474DBF2A1E2F03"}"},"total":1027},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7405588878968881945","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本书十分的好看，喜欢看无敌流的出门左转。这本小说所有的人智商在线，不无脑。这本书可以说是而且较好的一本书了。不过，这种类型我不是很想。不过这只是因人而异。整体来说还是十分好的。作者加油！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1724249642,"group_id":"7363524925379841049","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"大家好！萌新一枚，望大家多对关照","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N5J4vF9pTcz54yobGAaT3II=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/3392259085c546fda1623a3f2ee45473~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776880244&x-signature=k%2B3ELqo7Eko%2BV2PFwjRFNvAGMk0%3D","user_id":"396299544824895","user_name":"反派是站位不同罢了"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"396299544824895","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1703461637,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E4F5CD","can_worn":false,"id":3,"name":"烂尾督察员","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/972e1bec4437ce8e045aaf8e3bbfe1aa","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/47aabaca7b644a2b0eb9d35477c6d9df"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7363524925379841049","book_info":{"abstract":"［争霸］＋［权谋］＋[高端局]+［不无脑]

世家做大架空朝堂。
皇帝以我为刀欲要皇权重归天下，但却为我设计了无数死法。
感受到我的价值后，竟然欲将我阉割成为太监继续成为其手中之刃。
左相为世家之首城府似海，他指着湖中之鱼告诉我，你在湖里，天下也在这小湖之内，想活，做我的棋子。
右相说，你要心怀天下，心怀百姓，个人荣辱算不得什么，为天下之民去死也为死得其所。
但我却想问凭什么？！
你们之所以能掌他人生死无非是因手中之权坐下之椅，那若我手中之权大过你，坐下之椅高过你，又将如何？
既如此，那就在这世道搏上一搏。
胜为天下王！
败为真鬼雄！
尔等以心术掌他人生死，那吾便以心术夺这天下，跳出棋盘，以天下为盘以世人为子做那真正执棋者！[每天早上六点准时更新]
权谋争霸节奏不快，喜欢看快节嘎嘎乱杀的大佬就别点开了，免得到时候你气够呛还要给个差评。
我们要相亲相爱，互相伤害的事咱别干。
听话，嗷！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/63a273517cc9c485ea9b7862607ed7e5","author":"伦东","author_id":"","book_id":"7363524925379841049","book_name":"举棋胜天半子？抱歉，我玩刀的","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#e0d8c8","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"8194人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":273,"name":"历史古代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=273&name=历史古代&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":12,"name":"历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12&name=历史&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":452,"name":"架空","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=452&name=架空&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":837,"name":"争霸","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=837&name=争霸&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7363562258745524760","read_count":"8194","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1549261"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.0","serial_count":"728","tags":"历史古代,历史,穿越,架空,争霸","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/4809e6f673b38b3e8b28bf3ce879aabb~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779468514&x-signature=nL%2B%2F8RmFWp8%2BZsjW6YzAuwQk4lE%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"610981866903523","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"15"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260324004834C5E1A5474DBF2A1E2F03"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读不足30分钟后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":8,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":1799,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":12909},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1724681891,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7455381831274480409","common":{"comment_type":-90,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"感觉这才应该是真正的理智的合理的穿越文，因为主角不是像其他穿越文一样随便就能造出跨时代的东西，他说造出的东西都是在那个时代可以有的，不是想其他穿越文写到一二十章就能造出手枪和手榴弹之类的跨时代的东西，而依据就是一张似是而非的图纸？还是那种只有外观没有内部具体细节的图纸。 
反正这个小说的评价的话：没有其他那些穿越文小说里主角的目中无人，反而是处处充满了谨慎智慧以及从来都没有小瞧过任何人
很红军，很中国
但是唯一的缺点就是在前面每章的末尾都要感谢那么多人有点烦，还有就是谐音梗谐音的太犯规了，差点有些时候都没看懂写的是什么意思
但是话说回来了，这确实是一部好小说","text_exts":[{"e":168,"s":164,"text":"目中无人","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E7%9B%AE%E4%B8%AD%E6%97%A0%E4%BA%BA&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317742845142A1E2F03%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227455381831274480409%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227363524925379841049%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E7%9B%AE%E4%B8%AD%E6%97%A0%E4%BA%BA%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1735850333,"group_id":"7363524925379841049","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NzMdNkr5JPMYpbjhBdtU3Cs=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/933f19ad13784918bb13b60b8a09f1dd~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776882230&x-signature=fdOInrgIIbnJu%2BQ1uQRRh0iZ7%2Bo%3D","user_id":"66638053688","user_name":"陈情忘机(。ŏ_ŏ)"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"66638053688","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7363524925379841049","book_info":{"abstract":"［争霸］＋［权谋］＋[高端局]+［不无脑]
